label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out with whom Claire is dancing at the end of the dance. There are several partner swaps happening here, so I need to track each change step by step to avoid getting confused. Starting with the initial pairings: - Alice (A) with Helga (H) - Bob (B) with Jamie (J) - Claire (C) with Ophelia (O) - Dave (D) with Karl (K) - Eve (E) with Rodrigo (R) First swap: Eve and Bob switch partners. So Eve's partner becomes Bob's partner, and Bob's partner becomes Eve's partner. Initially, Bob is with Jamie, Eve is with Rodrigo. After swapping: - Bob is now with Rodrigo - Eve is now with Jamie So the new pairings are: A-H, B-R, C-O, D-K, E-J Second swap: Dave and Claire switch partners. Dave was with Karl, Claire was with Ophelia. After swapping: - Dave is now with Ophelia - Claire is now with Karl New pairings: A-H, B-R, C-K, D-O, E-J Third swap: Claire and Bob switch partners. Claire was with Karl, Bob was with Rodrigo. After swapping: - Claire is now with Rodrigo - Bob is now with Karl New pairings: A-H, B-K, C-R, D-O, E-J Fourth swap: Dave and Alice switch partners. Dave was with Ophelia, Alice was with Helga. After swapping: - Dave is now with Helga - Alice is now with Ophelia New pairings: A-O, B-K, C-R, D-H, E-J Fifth swap: Claire and Eve switch partners. Claire was with Rodrigo, Eve was with Jamie. After swapping: - Claire
